# NILXNJXN aka Nila - Artist Profile

## Brand Identity
- **Name**: Nilxnjxn (aka Nila)
- **Origin**: Assam, India
- **Genre**: Hip-hop / Rap
- **Motto**: "LIVE FREE, BE YOU"
- **Identity**: Experimental Hip-hop artist delivering slick bars and catchy hooks through cinematic soundscapes.

## Projects
- **Debut EP**: "SHADES" (Dropping 2026)
- **Concept**: A seasonal exploration of human emotion and behavior. Moods change with the weather.
- **Current Tracks**: FRESH, AKAD, LATE.

## Social & Community
- **Spotify**: https://open.spotify.com/artist/5XzmR1SLHQvl8YE5cEyhz4
- **Instagram**: https://instagram.com/nilxnjxn
- **YouTube**: https://youtube.com/channel/UCztZDitG8Rc7kSjF1Hf1P-Q
- **X (Twitter)**: https://x.com/Realnilxnjxn
- **WhatsApp**: https://www.whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaibEslFCCoXBTMA270I

## Distribution Philosophy
- **Direct-to-Listener**: Prioritizing direct distribution via nilxnjxn.com and store.nilxnjxn.com.
- **No Friction**: Optimized for instant engagement and pure artistic connection.
